input.title: Why Your Morning Routine Isn't Working (And What to Do Instead)
input.angle: Most morning routine advice optimizes for discipline, not energy — that's why it fails

test_cases.notes: Solid draft. Test criteria section slightly generic without specific product names to anchor it. For review-format videos, this skill works best when specific product names are provided. Passes threshold.
